chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-1599 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5909/2019 2. For orders on M.A No.5910/2019 3. For hearing of main case 04.11.2019. Mr. Shoukat Ali Pathan, advocate for petitioner = 1to3. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has not only sought for quashment of FIR out-come of crime No.30/2019 u/s 269 and 270 PPC of PS Tando Yousuf but has also sought for direction against the Chief Secretary Sindh that he may ensure that no such like case is registered against the petitioner in future. At the very outset it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that the case come out from crime No.30/2019 u/s 269 and 270 PPC of PS Tando Yousuf has come to a logical end and he would be satisfied if Chief Secretary Sindh is directed to ensure that no such like case is registered against the petitioner in future, as the petitioner is running his business under valid license with title of “Tipu Pan Masalla”. The registration of FIR is a legal function. If the petitioner would commit a cognizable offence then he will have to face the consequences. No official could be prevented from discharging his lawful duty by this Court by issuing the direction which the petitioner has prayed for. The instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
